name: kimi
description: Delegate investigation, review, and adversarial review to Kimi Code CLI from within Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate to Kimi Code CLI from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Invoke Kimi Code CLI headlessly from Codex for investigation, rescue, review, and adversarial-review workflows. Uses OAuth subscription (no API keys).
defaultPrompt: Ask Kimi Code CLI to review the current diff
Have Kimi Code CLI investigate a failing test
Get an adversarial review from Kimi Code CLI
